summary: Production code is sound, OBP-clean, and unit-proven (70 dedicated C# wrapper tests green; item apex storage-free, double-wrap killed structurally because base Data is not :item and Data<T> where T:item, leaf-dispatch serialization, coercion mediator rewritten for wrappers, text atomic, born-native construction). No production-code defect found. FAIL is for verification honesty: the branch's own PLang acceptance suite is hollow and the headline 'both suites 100% green / 272/272' silently excludes 35 stale entries that are the feature's end-to-end proof. 30 of 36 ScalarsAsNative test goals are `throw "not implemented"` stubs; of the 6 real ones only 1 (DictIsItemKeepsNoOrder) is built/committed/green, the other 5 are unbuilt (no .pr) hence stale. Not bouncing to coder because filling+building+running acceptance tests is the tester's job; but must not merge with a hollow suite presented as green.

findings_open.title: PLang acceptance suite is hollow; 272/272-green claim is misleading
findings_open.detail: Tests/ScalarsAsNative = 36 .test.goal but only 1 .pr committed (git ls-files). 30/36 are stub bodies (comment + `- throw "not implemented"`). 5 of the 6 real tests are unbuilt -> all 35 show as STALE and are excluded from the 272 pass count. The feature's end-to-end behavior (bool/text/date/time/duration/null born-native + truthiness + ops + null singleton, via the real runtime) is asserted only by stubs that throw. Incidental e2e coverage exists in other green PLang tests (TypeKindStrict, LazyDeserialize) but the branch's own gate is empty. REQUIRED before merge (tester): implement the 30 stubs, build all 6 real tests, commit .pr, runner must show them green (~307/307), and the 'both suites green' claim restated honestly.

findings_open.title: text op index-unit inconsistency (codepoint Length vs UTF-16 Substring/IndexOf)
findings_open.detail: text.@this.Length counts runes (EnumerateRunes) but Substring/IndexOf/Replace use UTF-16 char units. Latent: ops are unconsumed in production and TextWrapperTests only exercises ASCII. Settle on one unit before wiring these to the PLang surface.

findings_open.title: object/item serializer ownership inversion
findings_open.detail: Plan: no enduring PLang `object` type, yet type/object/serializer/json.cs remains the canonical json reader and type/item/serializer/json.cs delegates to it. The folded-away type hosts the live code while the surviving type forwards. Move the impl under item (or note why object reader is retained).

findings_open.title: Compare null-coalesce asymmetry
findings_open.detail: Compare.Order coalesces null.@this->C# null for sort-last (Compare.cs:42-43); AreEqualValues does not and relies on null.@this.AreEqual. Raw null vs singleton can compare equal one direction only. Edge-only (born-native always carries the singleton); add a regression test.

verified_sound: item.@this apex storage-free; truthiness + lazy narrow only; ordering/equality opt-in; dict:item inherits no order
double-wrap killed structurally: base Data not :item, Data<T> where T:item => Data<Data> uncompilable; Data<object> footgun gone
json writer leaf dispatch (writer.cs:142) one case for all scalars; IWriter has all bare-render methods
Operator.NormalizeTypes rewritten to inspect text/number wrappers; numeric widening stays in number tower
ScalarComparer collapsed to numeric+string+thin IComparable fallback; bool excluded as equality-only
UnwrapJsonElement born-native: String->text, True/False->bool.@this, Null->null.@this singleton
text atomicity: not IEnumerable; IsPlangIterable still carves raw string; foreach %text% won't char-iterate
on-error chain reconstruction: action.FromWire (marker-free FromWireShape), named factory not catalog hook
variable.set as<type> TypeFromWire/FromName split; @bool/strict unwrap is a real fix
no new Console.* / System.IO.* reaches in branch production C#
verification_method: Clean rebuild (rm -rf bin/obj all projects; dotnet build PlangConsole 0 err). C# 4165/4165 via dotnet run PLang.Tests (incl. 70 ScalarsAsNative wrapper tests). PLang via cd Tests && plang --test: 272 pass/0 fail/35 stale. Stale set diagnosed by git .test.goal-vs-.pr census + reading stub bodies. Read apex, all 7 wrappers, Compare/ScalarComparer, NormalizeTypes, json writer dispatch, construction seam, FromWire, constraint decl.
